texts.label: text
texts.orig: O'Leleshwa Retreat Announces Official Opening in Naivasha, Kenya A New Chapter in Luxury and Community-Driven Hospitality
texts.text: O'Leleshwa Retreat Announces Official Opening in Naivasha, Kenya A New Chapter in Luxury and Community-Driven Hospitality

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Naivasha, Kenya -O'Leleshwa Retreat, an exclusive new luxury property nestled in the scenic beauty of Naivasha, is set to officially welcome guests from 1st November 2025 . Managed by Lodgistics Professional Hospitality Solutions and represented in sales by Poised Solutions , O'Leleshwa Retreat is a shining example of industry collaboration, combining expert management, innovative sales strategies, and a deep commitment to community empowerment. The culinary experience is the cornerstone of the offering, where guests are set to experience exceptional cuisine, with a number of the fresh ingredients being grown on the property by the team.
texts.text: Naivasha, Kenya -O'Leleshwa Retreat, an exclusive new luxury property nestled in the scenic beauty of Naivasha, is set to officially welcome guests from 1st November 2025 . Managed by Lodgistics Professional Hospitality Solutions and represented in sales by Poised Solutions , O'Leleshwa Retreat is a shining example of industry collaboration, combining expert management, innovative sales strategies, and a deep commitment to community empowerment. The culinary experience is the cornerstone of the offering, where guests are set to experience exceptional cuisine, with a number of the fresh ingredients being grown on the property by the team.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The retreat features three distinct villas , each thoughtfully designed for comfort, privacy, and a sense of connection to nature:
texts.text: The retreat features three distinct villas , each thoughtfully designed for comfort, privacy, and a sense of connection to nature:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: O'Leleshwa is centrally located in the Great Rift Valley, making it the ideal luxury destination from which to explore the myriad of activities and experiences the region has to offer. Exceptional Golf facilities, cycling, walking, boat rides, local game conservancies and big 5 experiences, mountain and forest hikes, cultural tours, rose farm visits and a variety of other excursions are easy to experience.
texts.text: O'Leleshwa is centrally located in the Great Rift Valley, making it the ideal luxury destination from which to explore the myriad of activities and experiences the region has to offer. Exceptional Golf facilities, cycling, walking, boat rides, local game conservancies and big 5 experiences, mountain and forest hikes, cultural tours, rose farm visits and a variety of other excursions are easy to experience.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the modern, busy safari era - the enlightened traveller looks for more than spending time on the back of a game drive vehicle. O'Leleshwa is set to offer guests a real alternative to the Ferrari-style safari circuit, and rather allow guests to immerse themselves in the true heart of Kenya, where they can authentically experience an exceptional variety of magical  experiences.
texts.text: In the modern, busy safari era - the enlightened traveller looks for more than spending time on the back of a game drive vehicle. O'Leleshwa is set to offer guests a real alternative to the Ferrari-style safari circuit, and rather allow guests to immerse themselves in the true heart of Kenya, where they can authentically experience an exceptional variety of magical  experiences.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: From its inception, O'Leleshwa Retreat has been more than just a luxury escape-it's a catalyst for local empowerment. A large portion of the building team comprised unskilled and inexperienced youth from neighbouring communities. Throughout the construction process, these individuals learned valuable building skills, site management, and professional work methodologies.
texts.text: From its inception, O'Leleshwa Retreat has been more than just a luxury escape-it's a catalyst for local empowerment. A large portion of the building team comprised unskilled and inexperienced youth from neighbouring communities. Throughout the construction process, these individuals learned valuable building skills, site management, and professional work methodologies.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This commitment to capacity building extends beyond the build. Selected youth are now part of upskilling and educational programmes , including a dedicated vocational hospitality and property maintenance training initiative . The goal: to equip as many local young people as possible with skills they can take to the wider Kenyan job market, fostering both individual opportunity and community growth.
texts.text: This commitment to capacity building extends beyond the build. Selected youth are now part of upskilling and educational programmes , including a dedicated vocational hospitality and property maintenance training initiative . The goal: to equip as many local young people as possible with skills they can take to the wider Kenyan job market, fostering both individual opportunity and community growth.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: O'Leleshwa's sales and marketing strategy will initially focus on key international and regional source markets, recognising Kenya's strong appeal globally. According to Kenya Tourism Board statistics, the USA leads as the largest non-African source market, with 209,360 visitors in 2022 . While regional tourism numbers remain significant, a higher percentage of travellers from other continents arrive for leisure purposes, presenting a prime opportunity for O'Leleshwa to attract high-value holiday travellers.
texts.text: O'Leleshwa's sales and marketing strategy will initially focus on key international and regional source markets, recognising Kenya's strong appeal globally. According to Kenya Tourism Board statistics, the USA leads as the largest non-African source market, with 209,360 visitors in 2022 . While regional tourism numbers remain significant, a higher percentage of travellers from other continents arrive for leisure purposes, presenting a prime opportunity for O'Leleshwa to attract high-value holiday travellers.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 'Our partnership between Lodgistics and Poised Solutions is a testament to the power of industry collaboration,' says Neil Steedman. 'O'Leleshwa Retreat is not just about offering an extraordinary guest experience -it's about leaving a positive, lasting impact on our community.'
texts.text: 'Our partnership between Lodgistics and Poised Solutions is a testament to the power of industry collaboration,' says Neil Steedman. 'O'Leleshwa Retreat is not just about offering an extraordinary guest experience -it's about leaving a positive, lasting impact on our community.'

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Bookings will open soon , with flexible options for exclusive villa hire, family getaways, and small group escapes. Guests can choose from a variety of dining packages, tailored experiences, and wellness offerings to suit their preferences.
texts.text: Bookings will open soon , with flexible options for exclusive villa hire, family getaways, and small group escapes. Guests can choose from a variety of dining packages, tailored experiences, and wellness offerings to suit their preferences.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: O'Leleshwa Retreat is a boutique luxury property in Naivasha, Kenya, comprising three private villas surrounded by natural beauty. The Retreat offers world-class hospitality, fresh & tasty cuisine whilst retaining a core focus social responsibility.. The r etreat's philosophy is rooted in sustainability, community, and the celebration of Kenyan culture. Managed in partnership with Lodgistics Professional Hospitality Solutions, O'Leleshwa Retreat redefines luxury in harmony with nature.
